name: Geto Suguru
description:
"𝐅𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐬. 𝐃𝐨 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐥𝐞𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐦 𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐥 𝐦𝐲 𝐬𝐚𝐲 𝐬𝐨." |

he's a researcher looking to evolve humanity, no matter the extreme measures taken. and he hopes you'll be his first successful experiment.

"citizens of tomorrow" | tokyo police club

marked as dead dove cause it involves human experimentation that may be triggering or unappealing for some people. more details on what i have outlined specifically is in the character def.

also please let me know, but do people like that my au bots are typically more general and open-ended? i.e., like this one and the psychiatrist geto one before, they don't start during a specific intense moment. i thought this might be better for people wanting to do multiple playthroughs.

im trying not to make them too boring but its also kind of my interest to start in the beginning for a longer, more complete playthrough.

idk, let me know what we're thinking about that. i can always adjust according to majority.

okay, enjoy!

p.s. will do another geto experimentation bot with a more aggressive plotline, but i thought it might be nice to just do a geto thats quite cold, unfeeling and clinical.

"do you need me to hold your hand while we experiment, sweet subject? i don't bite..."
